quote: The craftsmanship was impeccable. They restored our antique settee beautifully.
author: Customer review

quote: Arnold and his team did an amazing job on my grandmother's rocking chair. The detail of their work is outstanding.
author: Chris S.

quote: Had a 150-year-old chair restored. Worth every penny of the $1,200. Looks brand new while keeping its character.
author: John Murray

quote: They restored my 1930s radio to its former glory. The attention to detail was remarkable.
author: Marc Entsminger
